enriched_points.expanded_content: This involves assessing the interfacial bonding in 3D printing through observational methods, focusing on material behavior and construction processes as seen in various studies.
Utilizing scientometric techniques to gather numerical data from existing literature, this analysis quantifies factors affecting the viability of 3D printing in construction.
This method compares different 3D printing techniques and their performance metrics, identifying key parameters such as material properties and construction speeds to determine best practices.
